pkgmetadata.longdescription: hglibThe hglib is fork of of [hglib](httpswww.mercurial-scm.orgwikiPythonHglib), which is library with a fast, convenient interface to Mercurial. It uses Mercurials command server for communication with hg.Only difference for now is just name of the package and updated tests. Basic usagepythonimport hglibclient hglib.open(path)log client.log(revrangetip)print(log) Dependencies Python 2.7 or 3.5 Licence MIT Contact Michal Siska michal.515k4gmail.com
